display: SCUM Dedicated Server ARM64 (EXPERIMENTAL - requires 8GB+ RAM, see notes)

battleye.desc: Whether to run the server with BattlEye anti-cheat enabled. Disabling is not recommended for public servers.

password.desc: Set the join password for your server (leave blank for none).

players.desc: Maximum number of simultaneous players. IMPORTANT: this server requires a minimum of 8GB RAM just to start with zero players connected, and memory usage grows substantially with player count, mods, and settings. Do not attempt to run this on a host with less than 8GB RAM available to the container.

port.desc: UDP port the server will bind to.

query_port.desc: UDP query port for server listing. Recommended to set as game port +2. Avoid the 27020-27050 range due to Steam conflicts.

commands: sh -c 'mkdir -p /tmp/scum && until [ -f /tmp/scum/SCUM/Binaries/Win64/SCUMServer.exe ]; do if [ -f /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamcmd ]; then box64 /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamcmd +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows +login anonymous +app_info_print 3792580 +quit > /dev/null; else steamcmd +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows +login anonymous +app_info_print 3792580 +quit > /dev/null; fi && box64 /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamcmd +@sSteamCmdForcePlatformType windows +force_install_dir /tmp/scum +login anonymous +app_update 3792580 validate +quit; if [ ! -f /tmp/scum/SCUM/Binaries/Win64/SCUMServer.exe ]; then echo "SteamCMD failed or crashed, retrying..."; sleep 2; fi; done && cp -r /tmp/scum/. . && rm -rf /tmp/scum'

run.command: sh -c 'id -u scum >/dev/null 2>&1 || useradd -m scum || adduser -D scum; mkdir -p /home/scum/.steam/sdk64; if [ -f ./linux64/steamclient.so ]; then cp ./linux64/steamclient.so /home/scum/.steam/sdk64/; elif [ -f /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamclient.so ]; then cp /root/steamcmd/linux64/steamclient.so /home/scum/.steam/sdk64/; fi; chown -R scum:scum . /home/scum/.steam; cd SCUM/Binaries/Win64; BE_FLAG=""; if [ "${battleye}" = "false" ]; then BE_FLAG="-nobattleye"; fi; exec runuser -u scum -- env PATH="/wine-installer/bin:$PATH" WINEPREFIX="/home/scum/.wine" xvfb-run --auto-servernum --server-args="-screen 0 640x480x24:32" box64 wine ./SCUMServer.exe -log -port=${port} -queryport=${query_port} -MaxPlayers=${players} ${BE_FLAG}'

name: scum-arm64
